## Summary

Briefly describe what this change does and why.

## Related issue

Closes #

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor (no behavior change)
- [ ] Documentation

## Checklist

- [ ] `scripts/check.sh` passes locally
- [ ] Tests added or updated; tests never touch real infrastructure (fakes only)
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior, config, or a provider's capabilities changed
- [ ] Change is scoped and incremental — large changes are split where possible
